name: Civic Credit Union
description_short: Civic Credit Union is a payday alternative lending provider based in Charlotte, North Carolina. Rated 1.3/5 with 152 Google reviews, reflecting limited customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Civic Credit Union is a payday alternative lending provider serving clients in Charlotte, North Carolina. With 152 Google reviews and a 1.3/5.0 rating, Civic Credit Union has built a significant presence in the local payday alternative lending market.

Civic Credit Union specializes in payday alternative lending services designed to help consumers find affordable alternatives to traditional payday loans. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

Payday alternative providers in Charlotte offer consumers a way to access short-term funds without the high costs typically associated with traditional payday loans. Civic Credit Union operates in a space where regulation varies by state, and consumers should verify that any lender they work with is properly licensed. Key factors to compare include interest rates, loan limits, repayment terms, and whether the provider reports to credit bureaus.

Consumers in the Charlotte, North Carolina area who are considering Civic Credit Union should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any payday alternative lending provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
